channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Transcription Influences Power, Bias and Justice
item.description: Transcription, whether manual or automated, is not a neutral process. This article explores how converting speech to text involves inherent assumptions about standardised language, often privileging t...

item.title: Ramaphosa calls for calm as anti-immigrant protests spread across South Africa
item.description: Presidential spokesperson Vincent Magwenya has reiterated that South Africans should not be broadly labelled as xenophobic, despite a wave of anti-immigrant protests taking place in several major citi...

item.title: US Secretary of State Rubio meets Pope amid tensions over Middle East conflict
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio visited the Vatican in an effort to mend relations strained by former President Donald Trump's criticisms of Pope Leo XIV regarding the US-Israeli conflict. Rubio, a ...

item.title: Los Angeles Jury Clears LAPD Officer in Fatal Shooting of 14-Year-Old at North Hollywood Store
item.description: A Los Angeles County jury has ruled that LAPD Officer William Jones is not liable for the 2021 shooting death of 14-year-old Valentina Orellana-Peralta. The incident occurred at a Burlington coat stor...

item.title: Fani-Kayode redeployed to South Africa as Nigerian Ambassador
item.description: Femi Fani-Kayode, former Minister of Aviation, don get new posting as Nigeria’s ambassador, from Germany go South Africa. Na him personally request this transfer shortly after him original ambassadori...

item.title: UN Invests $340 Million to Expand Nairobi Hub as Africa Gains Global Strategic Importance
item.description: The United Nations is putting close to USD 340 million into expanding its Nairobi headquarters, marking one of its biggest infrastructure investments in Africa outside peacekeeping operations. UN Secr...

item.title: Transforming a Small Laundry Room into a Functional and Stylish Cottage Entryway
item.description: Interior designer Virginie Martocq provides advice for renovating a small cottage space by converting an old laundry room and pantry into a welcoming entryway. The challenge was to create a stylish ye...

item.title: Oil Prices Dip as Investors Watch Mideast Peace Talks
item.description: Oil prices don drop as markets dey wait update on US plan to end di Middle East war and reopen di Strait of Hormuz. After prices don fall over 10% on Wednesday because of hope for peace, crude futures...

item.title: Exploring Justice and Nation-Building Through Personal Reflection
item.description: In a reflective conversation hosted during Power Week, Advocate Muzi Sikhakhane (SC) delves into justice not just as a legal principle but as a lived, lifelong pursuit. The discussion, guided by Sello...

item.title: Individual taken into custody over alleged sale of Morgan McSweeney's mobile phone
item.description: According to reports, authorities have detained a man suspected of attempting to sell a mobile phone belonging to Morgan McSweeney. The circumstances surrounding the incident remain unclear, including...

item.title: Rising Anti-Immigrant Sentiment Among South Africans: Trends, Causes and Policy Responses
item.description: Recent data from the Human Sciences Research Council (HSRC) shows that South Africans are becoming increasingly hostile towards immigrants, reaching the highest levels since 2003. The South African So...

item.title: Dom Guyot to Perform at Rappler Live Jam Ahead of New Single Release
item.description: Itinatampok sa Rappler Live Jam ang Cebu-based R&B at pop singer-songwriter na si Dom Guyot, na magpe-perform sa Rappler HQ sa May 7, 2026, alas-8 ng gabi. Kilala si Dom sa kanyang mga kanta tulad ng ...

item.title: Akhilesh Yadav visits Mamata Banerjee to discuss West Bengal election outcome
item.description: On May 7, 2026, Samajwadi Party (SP) leader Akhilesh Yadav visited the Kalighat residence of West Bengal Chief Minister and Trinamool Congress (TMC) chairperson Mamata Banerjee in Kolkata. During the ...

item.title: Philippine President Marcos highlights Cambodia-Thailand dialogue for peace during ASEAN Summit
item.description: During the 48th ASEAN Summit, Philippine President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. reported that Cambodia and Thailand have tasked their foreign ministers to continue diplomatic discussions aimed at p...

item.title: Rivers State Police Arrest 13 Suspects Linked to Brutal Assault on Journalist in Port Harcourt
item.description: The Rivers State Police Command don arrest 13 suspects wey dem connect to the brutal attack on one journalist, Mr. Allwell Ene, for Port Harcourt. According to the police PRO, ASP Blessing Agabe, the ...

item.title: Individual taken into custody near Andrews' residence over alleged public order and weapons offences
item.description: Police have detained a man near the residence of a person named Andrews on suspicion of committing a public order offence and being in possession of an offensive weapon. The arrest was carried out as ...

item.title: Man Pleads Guilty in Deadly Firebomb Attack on Boulder Demonstrators
item.description: Mohamed Sabry Soliman, an Egyptian national living illegally in the United States, has pleaded guilty to murder and multiple other charges related to a firebomb attack on a demonstration in Boulder, C...

item.title: UCP Raises Investigation Threshold at Elections Alberta While Supporting Progressive Committees
item.description: In May 2025, the United Conservative Party (UCP) of Alberta amended the Election Finances and Contributions Disclosure Act, significantly increasing the threshold for Elections Alberta to initiate inv...

item.title: Britannia Hotels prosecuted over fatal wardrobe accident at Liverpool hotel
item.description: The owners of The Britannia Adelphi Hotel in Liverpool are facing legal action after a tragic incident in which a 21-year-old guest, Chloe Haynes, died when a wardrobe fell on her in September 2022. T...

item.title: Color Photographs of 1950s Hawaii Capture Life Before Statehood and Mass Tourism
item.description: The article explores a collection of rare color photographs taken in Hawaii during the 1950s, a pivotal decade just before the islands became the 50th U.S. state in 1959. These images stand out becaus...
